name: int4head_startupq
description: TOKEN-FREE serve-path variant of int4-mtp-bi0-int4head (PR #801 Track 2). Identical to the shipped int4head submission EXCEPT the target model source: instead of pulling the PRIVATE pre-built Hub repo (which 401'd on the token-less HF runner), serve.py quantizes the PUBLIC base google/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-w4a16-ct lm_head to int4 W4A16 group_size=32 at startup via build_lmhead_quant.py. The built lm_head is byte-identical to the validated int4head (proven), so PPL/greedy/modalities are unchanged; only the source + auth requirement change. LOCAL VALIDATION ONLY — no HF job.
